---
title: 'catalog tui'
---

Launch a terminal UI for browsing the active catalog: entries, aliases, schemas,
and metadata.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog tui [OPTIONS]
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--refresh` | `10` (seconds) | Refresh interval for live updates. |

## Examples

```bash
# Browse the default catalog
xorq catalog tui

# Browse a named catalog with a faster refresh
xorq catalog --name analytics tui --refresh 2
```

The TUI exits cleanly on `q` or `Ctrl+C`.
